_comment: Default underwriting thresholds for UK BTL screening. Edit thresholds for different investor profiles.

_notes.min_gross_yield_pct: 5% gross is the floor for BTL outside Zone 1-2 London. Drop to 3.5% for capital-growth buyers.
_notes.max_price_premium_pct: Asking prices above comp median by this much trigger a fail. Raise if property has genuine differentiators.
_notes.max_annual_service_charge: Above £5k/year materially erodes net yield on typical flats.
_notes.min_lease_remaining_years: Below 90 years affects mortgage-ability and resale. Below 80 is a hard problem.
_notes.min_comp_count: Fewer than 3 comps = thin market, median unreliable — flag but don't auto-fail.
_notes.min_rental_listing_count: Below 5 live rentals = thin market — flag yield confidence as low.
